languages.text: "Из-за этого самого упрямства, Ваша Светлость. Пока долг не исполним отказываемся умирать".
"It is because of that very stubbornness, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We refuse to perish until our duty is done."
languages.original_text: "Из-за этого самого упрямства, Ваша Светлость. Пока долг не исполним отказываемся умирать".

traits.locale_text: "It is because of that very stubbornness, Your Lordship. We refuse to perish until our duty is done."
"It is because of that very stubbornness, Your Lordship. We refuse to perish until our duty is done."
"It is because of that very stubbornness, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We refuse to perish until our duty is done."
"It is because of that very stubbornness, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We refuse to perish until our duty is done."

languages.text: “正是因为我们固执，大人。职责完成之前，我们绝不会倒下。”
languages.original_text: "It is because of that very stubbornness, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We refuse to perish until our duty is done."

traits.locale_text: “正是因为我们固执，大人。职责完成之前，我们绝不会倒下。”

languages.text: "Tam da bu inatçılık yüzünden {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Vazifemizi tamamlayana dek yok olmayı reddediyoruz."
languages.original_text: "It is because of that very stubbornness, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We refuse to perish until our duty is done."

traits.locale_text: "Tam da bu inatçılık yüzünden {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Vazifemizi tamamlayana dek yok olmayı reddediyoruz."

languages.text: « C'est justement grâce à notre entêtement, Votre Seigneurie. Nous refusons de mourir tant que notre devoir n'est pas accompli. »
languages.original_text: "It is because of that very stubbornness, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We refuse to perish until our duty is done."

traits.locale_text: « C'est justement grâce à notre entêtement, Votre Seigneurie. Nous refusons de mourir tant que notre devoir n'est pas accompli. »

languages.text: «Es por esta misma testarudez, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Nos negamos a morir hasta haber cumplido nuestro deber».
languages.original_text: "It is because of that very stubbornness, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We refuse to perish until our duty is done."

traits.locale_text: «Es por esta misma testarudez, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Nos negamos a morir hasta haber cumplido nuestro deber».

languages.text: "Das liegt genau an dieser Sturheit, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Wir weigern uns zu sterben, ehe unsere Pflicht getan ist."
languages.original_text: "It is because of that very stubbornness, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We refuse to perish until our duty is done."

traits.locale_text: "Das liegt genau an dieser Sturheit, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Wir weigern uns zu sterben, ehe unsere Pflicht getan ist."

languages.text: 「ほかでもない、その強情さゆえなのです、{mf|閣下|閣下}。我々は、務めを果たすまでは、死ぬことを拒むのです」
languages.original_text: "It is because of that very stubbornness, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We refuse to perish until our duty is done."

traits.locale_text: 「ほかでもない、その強情さゆえなのです、{mf|閣下|閣下}。我々は、務めを果たすまでは、死ぬことを拒むのです」
